body:
## The Bug

On the landing page, the upper section of the pricing area  where the website usage steps are displayed  feels noticeably laggy during transitions. Additionally, the font styling in that section looks inconsistent and does not align well with the overall brand identity.

IÔÇÖve attached a video below for reference.

## Expected Behavior

* Transitions between the steps should be much smoother and more responsive.
* The font should better match the brandÔÇÖs typography and overall design language.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/757ec44e-5192-444c-9977-eae4e03a4e37

## Desktop Environment

* **OS:** Windows
* **Browser:** Vivaldi

Hey @ritesh-1918 I can fix properly and make it much cleaner and better assign me this bug so i can work on it

comments.body: Hi @arpan7sarkar, welcome to the project! ­ƒÄë I have assigned this issue to you. Please raise a PR when you have the fix ready.

Hi @arpan7sarkar, just wanted to add a huge thank you for attaching the video reference and writing such a detailed bug report! This kind of thoroughness is incredibly helpful and makes reviewing much easier. Looking forward to your PR!

Hey @arpan7sarkar!

Before you dive into the code, you'll need to set up and access the application to test your changes. Here is the step-by-step guide to get access to the dashboard:

### ??? Contributor Onboarding Guide
1. **Create an Account:** Go to the sign-up page on your local build (usually http://localhost:5173/signup) or our deployed link.
2. **Select the Company:** During sign-up, you MUST select **Ritesh Private Limited** as the company.
3. **Verify Your Email:** Complete the email verification step first.
4. **Request Access:** After your email is confirmed, you need manual approval to access the user dashboard. You can either:
   - Send me a formal WhatsApp message requesting access.
   - Or, simply reply here on GitHub with the email address you used to sign up.
5. **Get Approved:** Once I receive your request, I will approve your account from the backend. You will then have full access to the user perspective to reproduce bugs and test your features!

Happy coding! Let me know when you've signed up.
